title: koeleria inaequalis
intro: Koeleria inaequalis, also known as Red False Brome, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Koeleria inaequalis include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Koeleria inaequalis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
